core_model.structure_summary: A one-dimensional continuous-time Markov jump process on the non-negative integers whose master equation has gain/loss transition rates given by falling-factorial polynomials of the state, whose deterministic mean-field limit is a first-order ordinary differential equation with competing polynomial growth and decay terms.

variables.meaning: non-negative integer count; in the mean-field limit a continuous non-negative scalar density
transition-rate constants and the integer stoichiometry exponents of the falling-factorial rates
probability distribution P(n,t) over states whose evolution and mean extinction time are sought

notes: The master equation (linear in P) is the true core; the generating-function PDE and the nonlinear mean-field rate equation dρ/dt are derived consequences. Extinction/persistence via spectral or WKB analysis makes the absorbing boundary at n=0 structurally essential. Marked mixed because the master equation is linear in P while the reduced dynamics are nonlinear in the state.
